modals.durationHint: Each victim started in this batch will use the same lifetime. Preview: {{value}}.

empty.options: No options yet, please add options

podsNotice.flagPrefix: Flag environment variables / file mounts must start with `FLAG`; variable names can repeat and are not used as injection identifiers
podsNotice.flagVolume: Flag file mounts use volumes.FLAG_x.labels.value to specify the value
podsNotice.services: services only accepts: image, ports, environment, volumes, working_dir, command, cpus, mem_limit
podsNotice.networks: You can configure multiple networks; each container may belong to multiple networks
podsNotice.networksWithIp: When networks are set, each container must specify its network; if no IP is specified, one is assigned from the subnet
podsNotice.networksShared: Without networks, containers share a random IP; for inter-container access use 127.0.0.1
podsNotice.portUnique: When sharing an IP, ensure ports are unique
podsNotice.exampleIndent: The example below includes all supported fields; other fields are ignored. Use 2-space indentation.

yamlNotice.flagPrefix: Flag environment variables / file mounts must start with `FLAG`; variable names can repeat and are not used as injection identifiers
yamlNotice.flagVolume: Flag file mounts use labels value to specify the value
yamlNotice.dockerParams: Docker parameters only accept: image, ports, environment, volumes, working_dir, command
yamlNotice.containerUnique: Within a challenge, all container names must be unique and serve as the DNS hostname
yamlNotice.containerNetwork: Containers communicate via Hostname or localhost

hero.subtitle: Join the elite community of hackers, compete in real-world challenges, and master the art of cybersecurity through hands-on experience.

challengeTypes.subtitle: From web exploitation to binary analysis, our challenges cover every major domain of cybersecurity

web.name: Web Security
web.description: Exploit web vulnerabilities, master XSS, SQLi, and more

crypto.name: Cryptography
crypto.description: Break ciphers, crack codes, and solve cryptographic puzzles

forensics.name: Forensics
forensics.description: Analyze digital evidence and recover hidden data

binary.name: Binary Exploitation
binary.description: Exploit memory vulnerabilities including buffer overflows and heap exploits

reverse.name: Reverse Engineering
reverse.description: Disassemble binaries and firmware to uncover hidden logic and secrets

blockchain.name: Blockchain
blockchain.description: Audit smart contracts and find vulnerabilities in blockchain protocols

upcoming.subtitle: Register now for our upcoming CTF events and compete with the best

leaderboard.subtitle: Meet the elite teams leading our global leaderboard
